content: {"file": "backend/api/routers/assess.py", "summary": "This file contains API endpoints for submitting an SDD document for assessment, listing all jobs, and getting the status of a specific job. It handles file uploads, background task execution for assessments, and state management.", "rules": [{"name": "submit_assessment", "description": "Handles submission of an SDD document for analysis.", "conditions": ["UploadFile is provided with ppm_number, ppm_name, system_name, and optional review_mode"], "actions": ["Generates a unique job ID, saves the uploaded file to disk, creates an initial state object, registers the job in the registry, and schedules background task execution"]}, {"name": "list_jobs", "description": "Lists all assessment jobs with their current status.", "conditions": [], "actions": ["Fetches summaries of all registered jobs including their status and story count from the state manager"]}, {"name": "get_assessment_status", "description": "Retrieves the status of a specific job.", "conditions": ["Job ID is provided"], "actions": ["Returns the current state of the specified job or raises an HTTP 404 error if not found"]}], "dependencies": ["api.job_registry", "config.settings", "pipeline.runner", "pipeline.state"]}
